cockpit.deployments.deleteModal.title: Delete deployment
cockpit.deployments.deleteModal.confirmM: You are about to delete this deployment. This will remove all associated process, decision, and case definitions.
cockpit.deployments.deleteModal.enableCa: Enable the cascade option to also delete these instances.
cockpit.deployments.deleteModal.cascadeD: Also delete all associated process and case instances.
cockpit.deployments.deleteModal.cascadeT: If enabled, also deletes all running process and case instances that belong to this deployment.
cockpit.deployments.deleteModal.skipCust: Do not invoke custom execution listeners during deletion.
If enabled, custom execution listeners will not be invoked when deleting process instances.
cockpit.deployments.deleteModal.skipIoMa: Do not perform input/output mappings during deletion.
If enabled, input/output mappings will not be performed when deleting process instances.
